title: Adult Panto Unscripted
description: Now in its fifth filthy year, The Adult Panto Tour is cumming to Brighton, and this time, it’s totally [UNSCRIPTED]! - “Oh yes it f!?ing is!” This balls-to-the-wall panto smashes in the backdoors of your favourite pantomimes! With every character, scene, and even the title decided live by you, the audience. You’re in control, Daddy. From outrageous characters to downright filthy humour, no two shows are ever the same. Strap-on for a wild night of improvised madness, rude songs, and naughty nonsense as we ride you all the way through pantoland - where anything can happen (and probably will!)
content_warnings: Strong language, sexual references and adult humour
